## CheatReader v0.1.26

### Fixes
- Fixed desktop disguise icons not updating the runtime window/taskbar icon on Windows.
- Fixed boss key hiding so the reader is removed from the taskbar instead of only becoming transparent.
- Fixed boss key recovery by showing a tray entry while the reader is hidden, even when Hide Taskbar Icon is disabled.
- Restored the saved taskbar visibility setting after recovering from boss key hiding.

### Notes
- Runtime icon changes remain best-effort on desktop environments that do not support them.
- This release still does not change installer metadata, executable names, bundle identifiers, or package icons.
